name: Chocolate Cake -- Lowfat
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375F.
2. Lightly coat an 8-inch round cake pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. Cream the margarine and sugar in a mixing bowl using an electric mixer.
4. Beat in the egg.
5. Stir in the buttermilk. Set the bowl aside.
6. In a large bowl, combine the cocoa, salt, baking soda, baking powder, and sifted flour. Mix together well.
7. Add the creamed margarine-buttermilk mixture to the dry ingredients in one batch. Stir until the dry ingredients are thoroughly moistened.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
9. Bake for 35 minutes, or until a cake tester comes out dry.
10. Remove from the pan and let cool on a rack.
